question: Which of the following is true about the electricity demand trend in Region R during 2023?

options.A: Demand was highest in February and lowest in September.
options.B: Demand remained nearly constant throughout the year.
options.C: Demand steadily declined over the first half of the year.
options.D: Demand was highest in September and lowest in February.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
